sn28.8:0.3: The Dimension of Neither Perception Nor Non-Perception
sn28.8:1.1: At Sāvatthī … . The Venerable Ānanda saw the Venerable Sāriputta coming in the distance …
sn28.8:1.2: "Here, friend, by completely transcending the base of nothingness, I entered and dwelt in the base of neither-perception-nor-nonperception. Yet, friend, it did not occur to me, ‘I am attaining the base of neither-perception-nor-nonperception … .’"
